response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:25: ReGLOSS singing '瞬間ハートビート' (confirmed by on-screen text and search). 2. 01:25-01:42: Interlude/transition to solo stage. 3. 01:42-05:00: Juufuutei Raden singing 'JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!' (confirmed by on-screen text and search). 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs and formatted for JSON. Note: For 01:42-05:00, the song continues to the end. The lyrics for '瞬間ハートビート' are provided in the first scene. The lyrics for 'JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!' are provided in the second scene.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance segment of ReGLOSS (a hololive unit) singing '瞬間ハートビート' followed by a solo performance by Juufuutei Raden singing her original song 'JAPANの美術史♪お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW!'.

scenes.description: ReGLOSS members sing '瞬間ハートビート' while dancing on stage in 3D.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
出発点灯した不安をしていた日常に
違和感うんざりしていった見慣れたり聞いたりな眺め
理屈を超える変化を求めていた日々の中
突然君は現れた
全身の細胞を駆け巡るように
このモノクロだった景色が今
君と出会いからふるり彩ろう
心を奪われた気まぐれな瞬間ハートビート
よろしくの狭間もう一人じゃない
諦める未来予想図は同じ
夢を引き寄せたよ
果てしない旅路の向こうで
鳴り止まないロマンが持っている
傷ついた時にはね
いつまでも君と一緒ならここから先広がる
宇宙晴れ渡され空飛び出して気分は直腸の苦労は終わりにして全てかな
時計の針が回り回る
限られた時の中で
鮮やかにダンス
奪われた気まぐれな瞬間ハートビート
よろしくの頭もう一人じゃない
諦める未来予想図は同じ
夢を引き寄せたい夜明けしない旅路の向こうに
紛れもない奇跡があるはず
さよなら
残り止められはしないこの消耗
度付き進むだけさなりふり構わず
歩兵に限界はないから
みんな聞いて喜びを悲しみの場合分かち合っていこう
なと思っても
(Music)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Departing from the routine where I felt anxious, I was bored with the familiar scenery.
I was seeking a change that exceeded logic.
In the midst of the days, you suddenly appeared.
As if rushing through all the cells in my body,
This monochrome scenery
Now, by meeting you,
Colors up, my heart was stolen
In a whimsical moment, heartbeat
Between 'Nice to meet you',
I'm not alone anymore.
The future I've given up on,
I've drawn out the same dream.
Beyond the endless journey,
There must be a romance that doesn't stop ringing.
When you're hurt,
As long as I'm with you, spreading from here
Universe, clear the sky and fly out,
End the boring days of the straight path,
Everything is fine.
The hands of the clock turn and turn,
In the limited time,
Dance vividly.
My heart was stolen by a whimsical moment,
Heartbeat,
Between 'Nice to meet you',
I'm not alone anymore.
The future I've given up on,
I've drawn out the same dream.
Beyond the endless journey,
There must be an unmistakable miracle.
Sayonara,
It cannot be stopped.
Just keep pushing forward in this way,
Without caring about appearances,
There is no limit to the walk.
Everyone listen,
Joy, sorrow, happiness, divide them together.
Even if you think so.
(Music)
